name: codex-sound-alerts
description: Sound and desktop notifications when Codex needs approval or finishes a long task.

interface.shortDescription: Hear when Codex needs your attention.
interface.longDescription: Plays distinct sound and desktop notifications when Codex requests permission or finishes a task that ran for at least 60 seconds. It never approves a request or changes Codex permissions.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Codex Sound Alerts is installed.
